final:
// // This module outputs a constant 0 on each clock cycle when enabled by the ce signal. It resets to 1 when the clr signal is asserted.
module top_module(
  output reg [7:0] op,
  input clk,
  input ce,
  input clr
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (clr) begin
      op <= 8'b0;
    end else if (ce) begin
      op <= 8'b00000001;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module outputs a constant 0 on each clock cycle when enabled by the ce signal. It resets to 1 when the clr signal is asserted.
